👋 Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the checklist below so a maintainer
can review quickly. PRs that skip the checklist will be left open until the
information is provided.
-->

## What does this PR add / change?

<!-- One sentence — same shape as the entry itself. -->

## Quality checklist

- [ ] The project is **publicly accessible** at the linked URL.
- [ ] At least **one of**:
  - [ ] 100+ GitHub stars, **or**
  - [ ] documented third-party adoption / production users, **or**
  - [ ] is an official artefact (vendor SDK, model card, government release)
- [ ] I am **not the sole maintainer** of the project I'm submitting (third-party nominations preferred).
- [ ] The description is one factual sentence — no marketing copy, no superlatives.
- [ ] If a benchmark / date / investment figure is mentioned, a **primary source** is linked.
- [ ] Entry is placed alphabetically inside the appropriate section.

## Independent traction (please show evidence)

GitHub Insights graphs, integrations in well-known products.

## Related submissions

- [ ] Have you submitted this same project to other awesome lists in the last 14 days? If yes, list them here for transparency. (We cross-check anyway, transparency speeds up review.)
